name: 10_interference_scale
description: Critical facts buried in 150 distractors incl. near-misses; precision@5 at 2 checkpoints

steps.user_message: I'm Adam, I run IIMAGINE, a 7-person AI software company. We build a desktop AI companion for small business owners.
Sarah Chen is our lead developer. She joined us from Google last year and owns the memory engine.
I declined the Baxter & Co wholesale distribution deal. The margins were too thin and it would have made them 60% of our revenue — too concentrated.
steps.assistant_response: Sensible — concentration risk plus thin margins is a bad combination.

steps.user_message: Current MRR is $85k as of this month. Runway is about 14 months at current burn.
I personally hate taking on debt. Non-negotiable. We grow from revenue or not at all.
